title: vitis glabrata
intro: Vitis glabrata, also known as the smooth grape vine, is a species of plant in the grape family (Vitaceae) native to parts of North America. The leaves and bark of Vitis glabrata have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Vitis glabrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, or applied topically as a salve or poultice for external use.
